message:
fix(layout): guard force_temperature against zero max_iterations

Add .max(1) to max_iterations denominator in force_temperature() to
prevent division-by-zero if the function is ever called with
max_iterations=0. Currently safe because callers pass
force_iteration_budget(n) which is always >= 52, but the guard
makes the contract explicit and prevents future regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
